selected_title: The European experience concerning regional decentralization
question: What operational artifact in “The European experience concerning regional decentralization” could make the Decentralization feedback loop auditable?

evidence_spans.text: The current decentralization process is justified by the necessity of defining the role of the central administration as against the local administration, the political and administrative competences that shall be delegated to the local administration, the necessary sources, as well as the setting out of a reference framework on the performances of the decentralization process in the next period.

learned_claims: The inspected source addresses Decentralization, Administration (probate law) through the evidence summarized in the preserved span.
The abstract supplies a direct evidence span of 59 words; interpretation remains bounded to that span.
